## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm validate`
- [ ] `pnpm audit:security`
- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Security

- [ ] No secrets, private documents, `.env` files, generated `.kb/` or generated `.mimir/` state are included.
- [ ] Public documentation does not expose private project, customer, pricing, or validation details.
